options.text: I’ll hire two new freelancers right away.
I can reallocate Maria from the legacy project—she’s got the right skills. Can we start next Monday?
I’m not sure we have any budget left for more staff.
Maybe we can delay the launch if we can’t get more people.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体的资源解决方案（调派Maria）并附带可行的时间安排，符合‘资源请求要具体+建议方案’的原则。其他选项要么回避问题（opt_3）、要么推卸责任（opt_4），或未经协调就承诺外部招聘（opt_1），均不符合职场高效沟通的策略。
content.speakerText: For Q3, we’ll need one more dev and a UX designer to hit the launch deadline.
content.speakerTextCn: Q3我们需要再加一名开发和一名UI设计师才能按时上线。

options.text: I know John from marketing has done some dashboards—he can help.
Can we borrow Lisa from the BI team? She built the last three dashboards and has bandwidth this week.
Maybe we should just skip the visualization part.
I’ll send an email to HR to post a job opening.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确指出了具体人选（Lisa）、所属团队（BI team）、相关经验（做过三个仪表盘）和可用性（本周有空），是高效资源请求的典范。选项1中John非技术团队成员，经验不匹配；选项3回避问题；选项4耗时太长，不符合‘快速响应’的职场需求。
content.speakerText: We’re falling behind on the analytics module. We need someone with data visualization expertise.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们在数据分析模块上落后了，我们需要一位具备数据可视化专长的人。
